items.title: Kash Patel’s clothing brand website shut down after reports it was hacked
items.summary: According to users on X, the website was hijacked by hackers in an attempt to trick visitors into installing malware.

items.title: Apple says Epic lawsuit shouldn’t reshape App Store rules for all developers
items.summary: Apple is asking the Supreme Court to narrow the App Store injunction won by Epic Games and overturn the court’s contempt ruling over external payment fees.

items.title: Spotify’s AI bet: more of everything, less of what you want
items.summary: Spotify has released a bunch of AI-powered tools that nudge users to create more content. It can be a bit much.

items.title: We tried Google’s AI glasses and they’re almost there
items.summary: Google demoed prototype Android XR glasses that overlay Gemini-powered translation, navigation, and other information directly into your field of view.

items.title: Meta quietly launches a new Reddit-like app called Forum
items.summary: The company describes the app as a "dedicated space built for deeper discussions, real answers and communities you care about."

items.title: Smart ring maker Oura files to go public
items.summary: The Finnish company said in September that it has sold 5.5 million smart rings to date.

items.title: Audio-generation app Huxe, founded by former NotebookLM developers, shuts down
items.summary: Huxe said that it has pulled its app from App Store and Play Store, and that it will stop working later this month.

items.title: Finnish phone maker HMD bundles Indian AI chatbot onto new smartphone in push to reach local market
items.summary: The partnership is a potential testing ground for both companies to gauge the appetite for an India-focused chatbot.

items.title: Waymo expands pause to four cities as robotaxis keep driving into floods
items.summary: Waymo's robotaxi service is now suspended in both Atlanta and San Antonio, as the company works to stop its vehicles from driving into flooded roads.

items.title: SpaceX scrubs first Starship V3 launch just before liftoff
items.summary: SpaceX fueled the third-generation rocket booster and ship and was just moments away from liftoff, before calling a scrub. It's expected to try again Friday.

items.title: Soaring solar and a surge in hydro push more coal off the US grid
items.summary: The first data from 2026 seem to indicate that last year was an oddity.

items.title: Trump abruptly cancels EO signing event after top AI firm CEOs declined to go

items.summary: Keep the charging puck’s exposed pins far away from anything metal.

items.title: NASA undertakes major reorganization to reduce bureaucracy and move faster
